summary: Frontend testing of team page badges feature. All requirements verified successfully - 3 team cards displayed with correct Fondateur/Co-fondateur badges and colors.
passed_tests: Team page /equipe loads correctly with data-testid='equipe-page'
3 team member cards displayed in grid layout
Cheikh IBRA NDIAYE - 'Fondateur' badge with blue (#1E5AA8) background
Cheikh IBRA NDIAYE card has ring-2 highlight for founder emphasis
Dauda NIANG - 'Co-fondateur' badge with green (#4CAF50) background
Bassine NIANG - 'Co-fondateur' badge with green (#4CAF50) background
Team order correct: Dauda (left), Cheikh (center), Bassine (right)
'Notre histoire' section displays above 'Rencontrez l'équipe' section
Team cards have uniform size and layout
seed_data_creation: Static data in constants.js - TEAM array with isFounder:true for Cheikh IBRA NDIAYE
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badge logic in EquipePage.jsx lines 107-111 uses isFounder conditional to show Fondateur (blue) vs Co-fondateur (green) badges. All team data is static in /app/frontend/src/config/constants.js

tested_features.3_team_cards: PASS - Found 3 member cards in md:grid-cols-3 layout
tested_features.scroll_functionality: PASS - Page scrolls smoothly (initial: 0px, bottom: 1435px, height: 2766px)
